unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* * The Alt-Svc: header is defined in RFC 7838: * https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc7838 */
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */

function.name: alpn2alpnid

unit.comment: /* Given the ALPN ID, return the name */

function.name: Curl_alpnid2str
altsvc_createid
function.parameter_list: (const char *srchost, const char *dsthost, enum alpnid srcalpnid, enum alpnid dstalpnid, unsigned int srcport, unsigned int dstport)

function.name: altsvc_create
function.parameter_list: (char *srchost, char *dsthost, char *srcalpn, char *dstalpn, unsigned int srcport, unsigned int dstport)

function.name: altsvc_add

unit.comment: /* * Load alt-svc entries from the given file. The text based line-oriented file * format is documented here: https://curl.se/docs/alt-svc.html * * This function only returns error on major problems that prevent alt-svc * handling to work completely. It will ignore individual syntactical errors * etc. */

function.name: altsvc_load
altsvc_out

unit.comment: /* * Curl_altsvc_init() creates a new altsvc cache. * It returns the new instance or NULL if something goes wrong. */

function.name: Curl_altsvc_init
Curl_altsvc_load

unit.comment: /* * Curl_altsvc_cleanup() frees an altsvc cache instance and all associated * resources. */

function.name: Curl_altsvc_cleanup
Curl_altsvc_save
getalnum
hostcompare

unit.comment: /* altsvc_flush() removes all alternatives for this source origin from the list */

function.name: altsvc_flush
function.parameter_list: (struct altsvcinfo *asi, enum alpnid srcalpnid, const char *srchost, unsigned short srcport)

unit.comment: /* to play well with debug builds, we can *set* a fixed time this will return */

function.name: altsvc_debugtime

unit.comment: /* * Curl_altsvc_parse() takes an incoming alt-svc response header and stores * the data correctly in the cache. * * 'value' points to the header *value*. That's contents to the right of the * header name. * * Currently this function rejects invalid data without returning an error. * Invalid host name, port number will result in the specific alternative * being rejected. Unknown protocols are skipped. */

function.name: Curl_altsvc_parse
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct altsvcinfo *asi, const char *value, enum alpnid srcalpnid, const char *srchost, unsigned short srcport)

function.name: Curl_altsvc_lookup
function.parameter_list: (struct altsvcinfo *asi, enum alpnid srcalpnid, const char *srchost, int srcport, struct altsvc **dstentry, const int versions)
